inventory.purpose: Hash one-time probe tokens for storage and lookup without persisting the raw token.
inventory.key_source: TOKEN_HMAC_KEYS_JSON current+legacy key ring in Cloudflare Secrets or local .dev.vars
inventory.rotation_policy: Rotate by introducing a new current key, keep legacy keys for at least the maximum token lifetime, then remove them.
inventory.agility_plan: Versioned h1.<keyId>.<digest> hashes and current+legacy readers allow phased key rotation and future algorithm migration without breaking active links.

inventory.purpose: Generate one-time probe tokens with 32 bytes of entropy.
inventory.rotation_policy: Platform CSPRNG; no application-managed key material.
inventory.agility_plan: If platform guidance changes, keep token length at or above 32 random bytes and update the generator in one place.

inventory.purpose: Encrypt submitted crop, vitality, moisture, GPS, and image-key data before persisting it to D1.
inventory.key_source: SUBMISSION_DATA_KEYS_JSON current+legacy key ring in Cloudflare Secrets or local .dev.vars
inventory.rotation_policy: Rotate by introducing a new current key, keep legacy decrypt-only keys until encrypted records are either rewrapped or naturally retired, then remove the legacy key.
inventory.agility_plan: The versioned s1 envelope records the key id and algorithm so decryptors can support dual-read migration to future envelope versions without rewriting all rows in one release.

inventory.purpose: Encrypt uploaded probe-image bytes before persisting them to R2, while keeping legacy raw-object reads available during rollout.
inventory.key_source: SUBMISSION_DATA_KEYS_JSON current+legacy key ring in Cloudflare Secrets or local .dev.vars
inventory.rotation_policy: Rotate by introducing a new current key, keep legacy decrypt-only keys until encrypted objects are either rewrapped or naturally retired, then remove the legacy key.
inventory.agility_plan: The versioned b1 image envelope records the key id and algorithm so readers can decrypt legacy objects during rotation and rewrap to future formats without exposing raw image bytes at rest.

inventory.purpose: Generate synthetic image bytes and oversize payloads for integration coverage.
inventory.agility_plan: Keep test fixtures on the same platform RNG APIs as runtime code so compatibility issues surface during test maintenance.

migration_plan: Keep version identifiers in stored token hashes so readers can distinguish future algorithms or key formats.
Move submitted probe payloads from legacy plaintext columns to `submission_ciphertext` and retire plaintext fallback only after historical rows are migrated or naturally expire.
Move uploaded probe-image objects from raw R2 bytes to encrypted envelopes and retire raw-object fallback only after historical objects are rewrapped or expired.
Treat any new runtime cryptographic primitive as inventory drift until it is documented here and validated by npm run crypto:run.
Remove legacy token HMAC keys only after the longest issued token lifetime has elapsed.
Remove legacy submission encryption keys only after stored ciphertext has been re-encrypted or the protected records are no longer needed.
